message:
Add comprehensive pooling layer variant tests

Add tests for AvgPool2d (basic, padding, stride variants), AvgPool3d,
MaxPool3d (forward and wrong-dim error), AdaptiveAvgPool1d/3d,
AdaptiveMaxPool1d/2d/3d, MaxUnpool1d/2d/3d inverse operations,
and a zero-parameters assertion for all pooling modules.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
